full_text:
Yin Li “Black Boy” 尹禮 “盧兒”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Li (尹禮)aka“Black Boy” (盧兒)was born in Donghai?. A bandit leader, he later helped Zang Ba against the Yuan’s. Called Black Boy. Yin Li was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom.
